heading: Services
intro: Sabina personally leads every application — supported by a small family team handling communication and post-arrival help, not a rotating cast of junior staff.

sections.heading: Primary Assessment
sections.whyItMatters: Applying to the wrong program wastes time, money, and application fees. A clear-eyed assessment upfront prevents that.
sections.ourApproach: Sabina offers a free, direct evaluation of each student's academic record, financial position, and English proficiency, and gives honest feedback on which Australian universities and courses are realistic — not just which ones sound impressive.

sections.heading: Application Processing
sections.whyItMatters: A single missing document or missed deadline can cost a student an entire intake.
sections.ourApproach: We manage the full application from start to finish — form accuracy, supporting documents, statement of purpose review, and tracking every university's response — so students always know exactly where their application stands.

sections.heading: Documentation
sections.whyItMatters: Universities and the Department of Home Affairs both require specific, correctly formatted documentation. Errors here are one of the most common causes of delays and rejections.
sections.ourApproach: Sabina reviews academic records, financial proof, and Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE) paperwork line by line, drawing on her own experience navigating Australian institutions and immigration requirements as both a professor and a former applicant herself.

sections.heading: Visa Application & Interview
sections.whyItMatters: The student visa (Subclass 500) process evaluates genuine intention, financial capacity, and course fit — not just paperwork completeness.
sections.ourApproach: We prepare students for the Genuine Temporary Entrant (GTE) requirement, review financial evidence, and run through likely interview questions so students walk in confident rather than anxious.

sections.heading: Messaging & Communication Support
sections.whyItMatters: Students and families often have quick questions that shouldn't have to wait for a formal consultation slot.
sections.ourApproach: A dedicated team member handles day-to-day messages, calls, and emails, keeping students updated and routing anything that needs Sabina's direct attention to her promptly.

sections.heading: Post-Arrival Support
sections.whyItMatters: The transition doesn't end at visa approval — settling into a new country, city, and institution brings its own challenges.
sections.ourApproach: Because our team has a genuine, permanent presence in Sydney, we can offer students in-person guidance after arrival: practical orientation, pointing students toward accommodation and support services, and staying reachable as a familiar contact in a new country.
